title: AdvanceBars - Clean & Connected Health Bars
description: Turns the Hotbars into traditional Continuous ones with smooth patterns!
body:
Introducing the AdvanceBars Texture Pack – Transform your Minecraft survival experience with a sleek and minimalist overhaul of the core UI elements!

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

🔮 Immerse Yourself

Dive into a refreshed gameplay atmosphere as the hotbar, health bar, hunger bar, XP bar, and armor bar seamlessly blend together, evoking the nostalgia of traditional health bars.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

🎨 Minimal Elegance

Embrace the beauty of simplicity with a stunning semi-transparent pattern that graces your UI elements. Say goodbye to clutter and hello to a streamlined aesthetic that enhances your  gameplay without distractions.

 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

🛡️ Enhanced Readability

Bid farewell to intricate outlines and separators that once cluttered your screen. AdvanceBars optimizes clarity, making vital information easily legible, even in the heat of battle.

 

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

🔗 Unity in Design

Forge a connection between your in-game stats with a design that unifies all the bars, giving you a holistic view of your survival status at a glance.

 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

🪄 Compatibility and Ease

Compatible with Minecraft 1.13 to 1.20.1, AdvanceBars seamlessly integrates into your world, enhancing your Minecraft journey without complicating it.

 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

Supported Minecraft Versions: 1.13 ➔ 1.21.5
